displayName: CA-004 — Strict MFA for Admin Accounts
description: Dedicated MFA policy targeting IT administrator accounts specifically. Admin accounts are the primary target of attackers — a compromised admin account can modify security settings, create users, grant permissions, and access everything. This policy challenges admin accounts at every sign-in risk level (Low, Medium, High) with zero exceptions. CA-001 covers all users; CA-004 creates an explicit, separate policy for admin accounts so they can be monitored, audited, and tightened independently.

_metadata.threat: Privileged account compromise — admin account takeover
_metadata.mitre_tactic: Privilege Escalation — T1078 Valid Accounts / T1098 Account Manipulation
